n: Instance: The Battle of the Ford, Afternoon

steps.t: You have come down the road in retreat with Grimbold, and he has put up his hand to stop you.
Grimbold has fought off his opponent and wants to speak with you while he catches his breath.
The men are disorganized and in chaos, and Grimbold wants to gather them together for one last stand.
A rider has brought disturbing news: a second force of uruks has left Isengard in secret and has driven the defending force at the Ford of Isen back i…
